nodes.title: Return a Promise from the helper
nodes.why: `sleep` is meant to be awaited, so returning a Promise is the natural API.
nodes.alternative: Take a callback instead of returning a Promise.
nodes.tradeoff: Works cleanly with async/await, but requires Promise support.

nodes.title: Resolve the promise using `setTimeout`
nodes.why: `setTimeout` schedules completion after the requested delay.
nodes.alternative: Use a loop with timestamps (busy-wait, not recommended).
nodes.tradeoff: Simple and non-blocking, but timer precision is not exact to the millisecond.

nodes.title: Use `ms` directly as the delay input
nodes.why: The function stays minimal and transparent: delay behavior is fully controlled by the caller.
nodes.alternative: Clamp negative values or coerce non-numbers before scheduling.
nodes.tradeoff: Tiny implementation, with fewer built-in safety guards.
